data.title: Two-Step Verification
data.description: Additional layer of security requiring a PIN for verification.
data.technical_spec: User-configurable security option with email recovery.

data.title: Advanced Threat Detection
data.description: Monitors patterns to detect and mitigate threats in real-time.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning algorithms for anomaly detection.

data.title: Server-Side Encryption
data.description: All data and messages are encrypted at rest on WhatsApp servers.
data.technical_spec: AES and other strong encryption standards for data protection.

data.title: Spam Detection and Blocking
data.description: Identifies and prevents spam messages and accounts.
data.technical_spec: Data analytics and user reporting systems.

data.title: Authentication Token Management
data.description: Manages session tokens to ensure secure user identities.
data.technical_spec: OAuth or JWT implementation for session management.
